name: 04_condition_met_count_zero_to_one
description: Condition met (magnitude AND MC sanity), starting from count=0. Increments to 1; no hit yet (1 < 3).
derivation: armed=True, not triggered, so guard passes. Magnitude check: current_return -1.5 <= (stop_trigger_level -1.0) - MAGNITUDE_FLOOR_PCT(0.10) = -1.10 -> -1.5 <= -1.10 is TRUE. MC sanity: prob_beating 30.0 < MC_SANITY_THRESHOLD(60.0) is TRUE. Condition met. new_count = 0 + 1 = 1. Hit = (1 >= EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS(3)) is False.
